channel.title: Posts on n0rmh3ll
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on n0rmh3ll

item.title: Building a Functional AD Homelab from Scratch - Part 1
item.description: Building a cost-effective, high-performance Active Directory Home lab for Red Team research and CRTP practice.

item.title: Understanding AdminSDHolder Persistence in Active Directory
item.description: Deep dive into Active Directory AdminSDHolder and SDprop

item.title: How I Recovered My Kali + Windows Dual Boot After a BIOS Update Broke GRUB
item.description: A complete step-by-step guide to restoring GRUB after a BIOS update removes Kali Linux from boot menu. No data loss. Detailed troubleshooting walkthrough.

item.title: Crocc Crew — TryHackMe Detailed Writeup
item.description: Full detailed walkthrough of the Crocc Crew room on TryHackMe
